solution: 
```class Solution:
    def minimumLength(self, s: str) -> int:
        left, right = 0, len(s) - 1
        while left < right:
            if s[left] != s[right]:
                break
            char = s[left]
            while left <= right and s[left] == char:
                left += 1
            while left <= right and s[right] == char:
                right -= 1
        return right - left + 1
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Two-pointer technique efficiently trims equal character prefixes and suffixes.
